scripts.dev:emulators: pnpm build && node scripts/run-firebase.mjs emulators:start --project demo-tastes --export-on-exit=.firebase-data
scripts.dev:emulators:restore: pnpm build && node scripts/run-firebase.mjs emulators:start --project demo-tastes --import=.firebase-data --export-on-exit=.firebase-data
scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:rules && pnpm test:auth
scripts.test:rules: TEST_PROJECT_ID=demo-tastes-test node scripts/run-firebase.mjs emulators:exec --config firebase.test.json --project demo-tastes-test --only firestore "vitest run tests/rules"
scripts.test:auth: pnpm build && TEST_PROJECT_ID=demo-tastes-test TEST_FUNCTIONS_HOST=127.0.0.1:5002 node scripts/run-firebase.mjs emulators:exec --config firebase.test.json --project demo-tastes-test --only auth,firestore,functions "vitest run tests/auth"
